name: Apocalypse
collationMethod: US: sequential collation, 10x11 sheets, two common runs (A 30 cards, B 25 cards); Belgian: striped collation

draft.notes: US pack order: 11 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare; foil is last card, displaces same rarity (e.g. foil rare replaces the rare). Not possible to get more than one foil per pack. Belgian printing: 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 11 commons, striped collation.

sourceNotes: Small set. Printed USA and Belgium. US booster commons: 6 from run A, 5 from run B. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
